response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages (including Python, JavaScript, DLang, C/C++), and a proven track record in distributed systems and open-source tooling, but lacks explicit evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or growth measurement frameworks at scale — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through open-source contributions, workshops, and cross-team tooling development
Proficient in multiple languages including Python, JavaScript, and C/C++, with hands-on experience in telemetry-like systems (GIS data collection, real-time metrics)
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or shipping experimentation frameworks, feature flighting, or guardrail systems for growth initiatives
Lacks demonstrable experience with AI-driven engineering velocity tools or AI-first growth platforms as emphasized in the job description
Minimal mention of cross-functional collaboration with Product, Data Science, or Research teams to translate business goals into measurable systems
